title: How to Fix the Missing Enter Key or Not Return Button When Typing in Instagram 2026
description:
In this video, I will show you How to Fix the Missing Enter key or Not Return Button When Typing in Instagram 2026.


Hello everyone! In today’s video, I’ll show you how to fix the missing Enter key when typing—especially when using Instagram.

Let’s start with the first method:

1. Turn Off Auto-Correct and Predictive Text
One of the most common reasons for the Enter key not showing on Instagram keyboard is interference from keyboard settings.
Go to your phone’s Settings, then tap General (or System, depending on your device), and select Keyboard.
Now turn off Auto-Correct and Predictive Text.

After doing this, go back to Instagram and check if the Enter or Return key has reappeared while typing.

2. Change Your Keyboard Layout or App
If you're still facing the issue, try switching your keyboard layout. Some layouts replace the Enter key with the Send button on Instagram.
Open Keyboard Settings and change to a different layout—or try a different keyboard app like Gboard or SwiftKey.
This can often restore the missing Enter key on Android or iPhone.

Once done, return to Instagram and check if the key is now visible.

3. Update the Instagram App
Sometimes a bug in the Instagram app causes the Enter key to disappear.
Open your App Store (for iPhone) or Google Play Store (for Android) and check for updates.
If an update is available, install it and then reopen Instagram.

This step is essential for fixing any Instagram keyboard issues on mobile.

With these steps, you should now know how to fix the missing Enter key when typing on Instagram or other apps. These fixes work across most devices and resolve problems like return key not showing on mobile keyboard.

And that’s it for today’s video!
If you found this tutorial helpful, please like, subscribe, and feel free to leave a comment below if you have questions.

Thanks for watching, and see you in the next one!

title: How to Host Api on Hostinger 2026 Easily
description:
In today’s video, I’m going to teach you How to Host Api on Hostinger 2026 Easily in just 5 minutes.

Whether you’re launching a new app or migrating an existing one to the cloud, Hostinger makes it remarkably easy to manage your hosting needs. We’ll walk through each step so you can get your API up and running smoothly.

Step 1: Visit Hostinger
Let’s begin by heading to the Hostinger website. Simply open your browser and go to hostinger.com.

Step 2: Log In to Your Account
Click the Login button at the top right corner of the homepage. Enter your credentials to access your dashboard. If you don’t have an account, signing up is quick and straightforward.

Step 3: Access the hPanel Dashboard
Once logged in, you’ll be directed to the hPanel, Hostinger’s intuitive control panel. This is your central hub for managing websites, files, and domains.

How to Host a PHP API on Hostinger (Shared Hosting)
Now, let’s jump into hosting your PHP API using Hostinger's shared hosting:

🔹 1. Choose a Shared Hosting Plan
All shared hosting plans support PHP. Make sure your hosting is active and linked to your domain.

Now go to the public_html folder. This is the root directory where your website and API files live. Upload your API files here, or create a separate folder named “API” if you want to keep things organized.

For example, if you place your files inside a folder called "API", your endpoint will look something like: yourdomain.com/api/user.php.

If you’re using a database, make sure your database connection settings are correct. Hostinger provides your database name, username, and password in the hPanel under the databases section.

Next, you might want to secure your API. Make sure SSL is active on your domain — Hostinger gives you a free SSL certificate which you can activate easily from the dashboard. Also, always validate and sanitize any user input to keep your data safe.

Finally, you can test your API using a browser or a tool like Postman. Just open your API link and check if it’s returning the expected result.

And that’s it — your PHP API is now live and running on Hostinger.
This setup is fast, affordable, and scalable—perfect for developers launching apps or services. Don’t forget to monitor your API performance and secure your endpoints properly.

Thanks for watching, and happy coding!

title: How to Delegate Access to a Google Workspace Users Email, Give Admin Access of Gmail 2026 Easily
description:
In this video, I’ll show you how to delegate access to a Gmail account in Google Workspace so another user—such as an assistant, manager, or team member—can manage emails without needing a password. This is perfect for business users who want to share their inbox securely.

We’ll go through the 2026 method for setting up Gmail delegation via the Admin Console or directly from the user’s Gmail settings. You’ll learn how to grant access, remove delegates, and understand the limitations and permissions for delegated accounts. Delegation is a smart way to allow shared management without risking security.

Ideal for executives, teams, and organizations using Gmail under Google Workspace with custom domains.
